title: Exzact Children's Dinner Set/Cutlery Gift Set Stainless Steel Porcelain - 1 x Bowl, 1 x Plate, 1 x Dinner Knife, 1x Fork, 1 x Teaspoon,1 x Table Spoon - Unicorn
features: ✅ EXZACT deluxe children’s cutlery gift set in a beautiful gift box. Includes 1 x cereal/soup bowl, 1 x dinner plate, 1 x dinner knife, 1 x dinner fork, 1 x tea spoon, and 1 x table spoon. All in children size and child-friendly shape.
✅ Material: Porcelain/ New China Bone, Mirror Polished Stainless Steel.
✅ Dimension: Cereal Bowl 12.7 CM x 6.5 CM, Dinner Plate 19.3 CM x 2.3 CM, Gift Box 36.7 CM x 23.2 CM x 8.5 CM.
✅ In cutest unicorn pattern, helpful when parents and carers try to draw children’s interest to sit by the table and have their meals, also help to build kids’ ability of concentration.
✅ Perfect gifting idea for kids’ birthday, Christmas, housewarming, and all events and parties. Easy to clean, dishwasher safe.
description: Product Description Innovative, Dynamic and Excellent in Home, Travel and Smart Life. Exzact children cutlery sets are made from high-quality stainless steel and perfectly designed to suit children's dinning of age group from 24 months to 12 years. With our Ergonomic design, kids learn how to eat quicker and effortless. Exzact Stainless Steel 18 PCS Children Cutlery Set/ Flatware Set Exzact Children Cultery - Happy Meal Time ! Our stainless steel flatware collection allows safe and easy to use for all age group. From children to adults to enjoy meal time together. Design Safety Happiness EXZACT Children's Dinner Set/Cutlery Gift Set 6 Pieces EXZACT deluxe children’s cutlery gift set in a beautiful gift box. Includes 1 x cereal/soup bowl, 1 x dinner plate, 1 x dinner knife, 1 x dinner fork, 1 x tea spoon, and 1 x table spoon. All in children size and child-friendly shape In the cute animal pattern, helpful when parents and carers try to draw children’s interest to sit by the table and have their meals, also help to build kids’ ability of concentration. Perfect gifting idea for kids’ birthday, Christmas, housewarming, and all events and parties. Easy to clean, dishwasher safe. suggest for 24 months +. Stainless Steel Mirror finishing polish surface treatment that bring the true shine out of the premium stainless steel Food grade and free of any hazardous materials. Safety Serrated Safe and Kid friendly Knives Easily cut pasta or fruit by safety serrated knives. Dishwasher Safe Simply clean with warm water and air dry. Dishwasher safe, extremely durable. *Kind reminder: not leave your cutlery sitting in water, as soaking can permanently damage the metal. Gifting Great gift for kids as a birthday present or Christmas gift.
